0011011011110001 1100001001011101 0 -> sum: 1111100101001110, cout: 0
1011100001000001 0010010000011000 0 -> sum: 1101110001011001, cout: 0
0000000111011000 1101100000011101 1 -> sum: 1101100111110110, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
